# Mechanical Engineering

Established 2007

[Faculty](/departments/mech/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To develop world-class mechanical engineers with innovative thinking and practical skills.

### Mission

* Impart quality education in mechanical engineering fundamentals
* Foster research in manufacturing, thermal, and design engineering
* Build strong industry connections for practical training
* Promote sustainable engineering practices

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Mechanical Engineering

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 120

### M.E. CAD/CAM

Duration: 2 yearsIntake: 18

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Manufacturing Technology Lab
* Thermal Engineering Lab
* Fluid Mechanics Lab
* CAD/CAM Lab
* Dynamics Lab
* Metrology Lab
